title: dryopteris repens
intro: Dryopteris repens, also known as the creeping male fern, is a species of flowering plant in the fern family, native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Dryopteris repens include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to soothe digestive issues, lower blood pressure, and act as an antiseptic. Dryopteris repens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, with the latter often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
